title: Tainted Gospal
lyrics: I hear that shit, getting fucked up, getting lucked up, getting mucked up, are you mucking up? Are you fucking everything? Like fucking guilty? Come on, man. Is this kangaroo? Is this kangaroo caught? Is it kangaroo? Is it kangaroo caught? Liar, liar, liar. Show me the fucking difference. I hear that shit, getting fucked up, getting lucked up, getting mucked up, are you mucking up? Can you even look at your fucking self? Now you see who you are, crystal, crystal fucking clear. Holders of love. Dig that ditch, dig that ditch, bitch. Dig your fucking ditch. Fucking KSL, you motherfucking get rich. Are you coming back Saturday? Are you coming back Saturday? Fuck that. Fuck it. I'm taking that shit, man, like, it's owed to me, bitch. I said, coming with a heavy hitter, heavy hitter, heavy hitter. Don't cry, don't cry, just come along. Don't buy, don't lie, just come along, come along. I'm taking that shit, I'm taking that shit. Are you begging for it, and you want it? Oh, here it comes, here it comes, here it comes. Falling away, fall away from life, you're just falling. Or are you thrown? Do you know that you're ozoned? Dead flying, dead flying, you're dying. Dead flying, dead flying, you're dying again. Why, why are you dying? Why, why are we crying? Why, why are you running? Why are you running, why are you running away? Fucking run away, fucking run away. When you have it all inside. All, ayy, everything. So bliss this, and miss this, and fuck this. I don't even know if that's the order it all gets down. Can I break it down? I, I, I, I. I said I, I, I, I, I. I, ass, motherfucker. Motherfucker floating like a motherfucker. Floating like a motherfucker. Floating like a motherfucker. Floating like a motherfucker. I'm floating like a motherfucker. Up high, bitch. Yeah, I'm up high, bitch. Better just cry, yeah. Are you gonna cry for me? Are you gonna cry for me? Fuck no. So I'll lavage your ass and your soul. Stop trying, stop trying. I got it, I got it. Got the ball. Fucking stop doing. Your life's not over, your life's not over. Your shit's not over, the game's not over. Continue. End it all. Fuck that motherfucker. No daggadance, no daggadance. Balance that shit, balance that shit. No daggadance, no daggadance. Come back real. Boom. Do you feel it all work? Did it get you fucking wet? You can have it. You can have it. You can have it all. My road, my thorn, my crown. My horse, my shit. All my bullshit, bitch. You can have it here. Now you know. Let the scribe rose high, bitch. Where you wanna go? Take you out to lunch, bitch. Take you out for brunch. You like some eggos? A little brusque? Fuck you, bitch. Go away.
